

Crouch, N.M.A., Capurucho, J.M.G., Hackett, S.J. & Bates, J.M. (2018)
[Evaluating the contribution of dispersal to community structure in
neotropical passerine birds](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.03927).
*Ecography*, **42**, 390--399.

Dalrymple, R.L., Flores‐Moreno, H., Kemp, D.J., White, T.E., Laffan,
S.W., Hemmings, F.A., Hitchcock, T.D. & Moles, A.T. (2018) [Abiotic and
biotic predictors of macroecological patterns in bird and butterfly
coloration](https://doi.org/10.1002/ecm.1287). *Ecological Monographs*,
**88**, 204--224.

Di Virgilio, G., Wardell-Johnson, G.W., Robinson, T.P., Temple-Smith, D.
& Hesford, J. (2018) [Characterising fine-scale variation in plant
species richness and endemism across topographically complex, semi-arid
landscapes](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jaridenv.2018.04.005). *Journal of
Arid Environments*, **156**, 59--68.

Elliott, M.J., Knerr, N.J. & Schmidt‐Lebuhn, A.N. (2018) [Choice between
phylogram and chronogram can have a dramatic impact on the location of
phylogenetic diversity hotspots](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.13399).
*Journal of Biogeography*, **45**, 2190--2201.

Garcia--R, J.C., Gonzalez‐Orozco, C.E. & Trewick, S.A. (2018)
[Contrasting patterns of diversification in a bird family (aves:
Gruiformes: Rallidae) are revealed by analysis of geospatial
distribution of species and phylogenetic
diversity](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.03783). *Ecography*, **42**,
500--510.

Laffan, S.W. (2018) *[Phylogeny-based measurements at global and
regional scales](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-93145-6_6)*.
*Phylogenetic diversity: Applications and challenges in biodiversity
science* (ed. by R. Scherson) and D. Faith), pp. 111--129. Springer.

Link‐Pérez, M.A. & Laffan, S.W. (2018) [Fern and lycophyte diversity in
the pacific northwest: Patterns and
predictors](https://doi.org/10.1111/jse.12430). *Journal of Systematics
and Evolution*, **56**, 498--522.

López‐Aguirre, C., Hand, S.J., Laffan, S.W. & Archer, M. (2018)
[Phylogenetic diversity, types of endemism and the evolutionary history
of new world bats](https://doi.org/10.1111/ecog.03260). *Ecography*,
**41**, 1955--1966.

Miu, I.V., Gabriel B., C., Popescu, V.D., Iosif, R., Nita, A.,
Manolache, S., Gavril, V.D., Cobzaru, I. & Rozylowicz, L. (2018)
[Conservation priorities for terrestrial mammals in dobrogea region,
romania](https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.792.25314). *ZooKeys*, **792**,
133--158.

MONTAÑO-ARIAS, G., LUNA-VEGA, I., MORRONE, J.J. & ESPINOSA, D. (2018)
[Biogeographical identity of the mesoamerican dominion with emphasis on
seasonally dry tropical
forests](https://doi.org/10.11646/phytotaxa.376.6.3). *Phytotaxa*,
**376**.

Orsenigo, S., Montagnani, C., Fenu, G., Gargano, D., Peruzzi, L., Abeli,
T., Alessandrini, A., Bacchetta, G., Bartolucci, F., Bovio, M., Brullo,
C., Brullo, S., Carta, A., Castello, M., Cogoni, D., Conti, F., Domina,
G., Foggi, B., Gennai, M., Gigante, D., Iberite, M., Lasen, C., Magrini,
S., Perrino, E.V., Prosser, F., Santangelo, A., Selvaggi, A., Stinca,
A., Vagge, I., Villani, M., Wagensommer, R.P., Wilhalm, T., Tartaglini,
N., Duprè, E., Blasi, C. & Rossi, G. (2018) [Red listing plants under
full national responsibility: Extinction risk and threats in the
vascular flora endemic to
italy](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2018.05.030). *Biological
Conservation*, **224**, 213--222.

Sosa, V., De‐Nova, J.A. & Vásquez‐Cruz, M. (2018) [Evolutionary history
of the flora of mexico: Dry forests cradles and museums of
endemism](https://doi.org/10.1111/jse.12416). *Journal of Systematics
and Evolution*, **56**, 523--536.

Spalink, D., Kriebel, R., Li, P., Pace, M.C., Drew, B.T., Zaborsky,
J.G., Rose, J., Drummond, C.P., Feist, M.A., Alverson, W.S., Waller,
D.M., Cameron, K.M., Givnish, T.J. & Sytsma, K.J. (2018) [Spatial
phylogenetics reveals evolutionary constraints on the assembly of a
large regional flora](https://doi.org/10.1002/ajb2.1191). *American
Journal of Botany*, **105**, 1938--1950.

Spalink, D., Pender, J., Escudero, M., Hipp, A.L., Roalson, E.H., Starr,
J.R., Waterway, M.J., Bohs, L. & Sytsma, K.J. (2018) [The spatial
structure of phylogenetic and functional diversity in the united states
and canada: An example using the sedge family
(cyperaceae)](https://doi.org/10.1111/jse.12423). *Journal of
Systematics and Evolution*, **56**, 449--465.

Tolley, K.A., Silva, J.M. da & Jansen van Vuuren, B. (2018) *[South
african national biodiversity assessment 2018 technical report volume 7:
Genetic diversity](https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.12143/6376)*, South
African National Biodiversity Institute, Pretoria.

Yap, J.S., Rossetto, M., Costion, C., Crayn, D., Kooyman, R.M.,
Richardson, J. & Henry, R. (2018) [Filters of floristic exchange: How
traits and climate shape the rain forest invasion of sahul from
sunda](https://doi.org/10.1111/jbi.13143). *Journal of Biogeography*,
**45**, 838--847.
